prompt: Compact modern UI mockup for WhaleFall login page, a Chinese DBA operations platform. Show a fixed top brand bar, centered login panel, username and password fields, primary login button, subtle security note, and a right-side operational status preview with database nodes and sync signals.
style: production-grade web application UI, refined industrial control-console, light theme, compact spacing
composition: desktop browser screenshot, 1536x1024, full page, crisp layout, no browser chrome
palette: warm off-white canvas, ink text, signal orange primary, cyan info, green success, red alert
constraints: Chinese interface labels, modern compact enterprise SaaS, no marketing hero, no oversized cards, card radius 8px or less, no watermark
